data.title: Ripple Launches Ripple Mint Platform for RLUSD Stablecoin Management
data.description: Ripple has launched the Ripple Mint platform, which allows institutions to mint, redeem and manage RLUSD stablecoins through a UI or API. According to Odaily, the platform is designed for institutional users.

data.title: Ruben Gallego Says Democrats Will Counter CLARITY Act Ethics Draft
data.description:
Democratic Senator Ruben Gallego said he will work with Republicans on a counterproposal to the White House-approved ethics provisions in the CLARITY Act, saying the draft released this week was “not a serious effort.” The remarks came after Senate Republicans on Wednesday released proposed text for the Digital Asset Market Clarity (CLARITY) Act that included ethics language barring all US federal officials, including U.S. President Donald Trump, from issuing or sponsoring any digital asset. Democrats said the provisions fall short, while Republican Senator Bernie Moreno described the draft as containing “the most powerful ethics language in US history.” According to Cointelegraph, Gallego criticized the Republican-backed draft in comments to Politico on Thursday, saying it did not reflect the months of work both parties had done on the legislation.

Gallego said he would continue working with Senator Thom Tillis and other Republicans to produce revised language. He said the effort is still ongoing and that Democrats intend to send back their own proposal. “We are still in this fight,” Gallego told Politico. “We are going to send back language.”

data.title: U.S. Senator Ruben Gallego Plans Counterproposal on CLARITY Act Ethics Rules
data.description:
U.S. Democratic Senator Ruben Gallego said he will work with Republicans on a counterproposal to the ethics provisions in the CLARITY Act that the White House has endorsed. According to Odaily, he said the draft released this week was "not a serious proposal."

U.S. Senate Republicans released proposed CLARITY Act text on Wednesday. The ethics provisions would bar all U.S. federal officials, including U.S. President Donald Trump, from issuing or sponsoring any digital asset.

Democrats said the ethics provisions are not strong enough. Republican Senator Bernie Moreno rejected that view, saying the draft contains "the strongest ethics language in American history." Gallego said he will move the counterproposal forward with Senator Thom Tillis and other Republicans and submit new draft language.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Analyst Shawn Kim Turns Bearish on Memory Chips, Jukan Says
data.description:
Citrini analyst Jukan said on X that a Morgan Stanley research report circulating in the market shows analyst Shawn Kim has turned bearish on the memory chip sector. According to Odaily, the report said NAND module inventories have risen to about 13 weeks, demand has cooled, and fourth-quarter NAND price gains are expected to slow to about 5%, with spot prices falling for two consecutive months.

The report also said CXMT is rapidly expanding capacity and that supply and demand are gradually moving into balance. It added that if NAND weakens, DRAM should also be viewed bearish, and that HBM market growth is expected to be limited to about 40%.

Jukan said he had verified the report with sources and that Kim has held similar views recently. He also said this may be one reason the South Korea KOSPI index has continued to pull back in recent weeks.

data.title: Wheat Extends July Rally on Supply Fears
data.description:
Wheat resumed its July rally after a brief bout of profit-taking as escalating geopolitical tensions and worsening weather in key producing regions kept supply concerns elevated, according to Bloomberg.

The move followed renewed worries over output and deliveries, with war risks and adverse weather supporting prices.

data.title: Charter Communications Makes Debt Exchange Offer
data.description:
Charter Communications Inc. unveiled plans to exchange a number of its bonds for cash and new debt, according to Bloomberg.

The offer is part of a move to revamp the company’s debt stack.

data.title: ETH Leads Major Crypto Perpetual Futures Liquidations at $55.83 Million
data.description: ETH recorded $55.83 million in estimated liquidations over the past 24 hours among major crypto perpetual futures. According to NS3.AI, BTC followed with $49.26 million, while SOL saw $7.22 million in liquidations.

data.title: Binance Will Extend Monitoring Tags to Across Protocol, Lisk, and Stacks
data.description: According to the announcement from Binance, the exchange will extend the Monitoring Tag to include more tokens on 2026-07-24, adding Across Protocol (ACX), Lisk (LSK), and Stacks (STX) to the list. Binance said tokens with the Monitoring Tag show notably higher volatility and risk than other listed tokens and are subject to close observation through regular reviews. The exchange also said such tokens may no longer meet listing criteria and could be delisted from the platform if future reviews identify concerns. The Monitoring Tags for the affected tokens will be updated shortly after the announcement is published, while other services related to these tokens will not be affected. Binance said its periodic project reviews consider the team’s commitment to the project, the level and quality of development activity, trading volume and liquidity, network stability and safety from attacks, network or smart contract stability, public communication, responsiveness to due diligence requests, material or unjustified increases in token supply or changes to tokenomics, evidence of unethical or fraudulent conduct or negligence, and contribution to a healthy and sustainable crypto ecosystem. The announcement did not specify any changes beyond the Monitoring Tag update for the three tokens.

data.title: Malaysia Sells First Dollar Bonds in Five Years on Rising Fuel Subsidy Costs
data.description: Malaysia sold $1.5 billion of dollar bonds in its first such sale in five years, according to Bloomberg. The fundraising comes as the Southeast Asian nation faces a fuel subsidy bill that is likely to more than double from an initial goal because of the Iran war.

data.title: Base v2 Snapshot Launches, Cutting Mainnet Snapshot Size and Sync Time
data.description:
Base engineer Eric Liu said Base v2 snapshots are now live. According to Foresight News, the mainnet snapshot size has fallen from about 7 TB to about 3.2 TB thanks to new sharding and higher compression, while sync time has been reduced from about 5 hours to about 2 hours, and pruned node size is about 1 TB.

GitHub release base/node v1.2.0 has been upgraded to Reth v2.3.0 and now formally supports V2 snapshots. Node operators must update to this version and migrate their databases to v2 storage. The release also fixes an issue that affected pruned nodes syncing from the genesis block. The official reminder said node operators should complete the migration before the MDBX hard limit deadline in mid-August.

data.title: South Korea's Laying Hen, Broiler Counts Rise in Second Quarter
data.description: According to Yonhap, South Korea's laying hen and broiler chicken populations increased in the second quarter from a year earlier, helped by a rise in chick placements at local farms. The total number of laying hens was estimated at 78.98 million, up 1.6% year on year, while broilers climbed 1% to 110.8 million, according to the Ministry of Data and Statistics. In contrast, beef cattle, including the Korean native breed hanwoo, fell 4.9% to 3.28 million as breeding cows declined. Dairy cattle also slipped 1.6% to 365,000, and pig numbers dropped 2.2% to 10.65 million.

data.title: Six U.S. Women Sue Unilever Over TRESemmé Hair Loss Claims
data.description: Six women in the United States have sued Unilever, alleging that after using TRESemmé shampoo or conditioner they suffered hair loss, thinning hair, allergic reactions and other scalp side effects. Jiemian News reported that the plaintiffs say the brand's DMDM hydantoin preservative caused the problems and that Unilever knew about the risk despite a similar controversy more than a decade ago. The report also said TRESemmé, known in Chinese as Xuan Shi, has entered China and was previously endorsed by singer Li Yuchun and actress Jiang Xin. JD Worldwide customer service said the products it sells do not contain carcinogenic ingredients.

data.title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev Says Company Has Not Issued Any Coin or Token
data.description: Robinhood co-founder and Chief Executive Officer Vlad Tenev posted on X that he has returned and is waiting for details from the X team to better understand what happened. According to Odaily, Robinhood has not issued any coin or token and asked users to stay safe.

data.title: STOCKS | Intel Q2 Revenue and Gross Margin Top Estimates, Q3 Outlook Raises Capex to Over $20 Billion
data.description: Intel reported second-quarter revenue and gross margin above market expectations, while its data center and AI business rose 59% year over year. According to PANews, the company also raised capital expenditure guidance to more than $20 billion and said its third-quarter outlook continued to exceed market expectations. Intel shares rose as much as 13% after hours before paring gains to about 4%.

data.title: WTI Trader Loracle Suffers Two Liquidations, Reopens Short Position After Oil Price Surge
data.description:
Trader Loracle suffered two system liquidations during the overnight oil price surge, with about 106,500 WTI short contracts liquidated at an average price of $92.3. According to Odaily, the two liquidations resulted in losses of about $681,200, plus about $786 in fees, making it the largest liquidation across the network in the past 24 hours.

About 12 minutes later, Loracle resumed shorting. The trader now holds 27,700 WTI short contracts in 3x isolated margin, opened at an average price of $92.2, with a position value of about $2.547 million and a liquidation price of about $155.05. Unrealized profit stands at about $14,400, with a return of about 1.68%.

Loracle has also placed 19 non-reducing sell orders between $93.4 and $95.2, planning to add another 15,000 short contracts with orders worth about $1.425 million. If all orders are filled, the WTI short position would rise to 42,874.228 contracts, with a notional value of about $3.9725 million.

Separately, the Houthis in Yemen said they attacked two Saudi oil tankers. U.S. President Donald Trump later said he was considering resuming large-scale military action against Iran, and WTI crude rose to as high as $93.

data.title: Machi Big Brother Sells Bored Ape 6801 at a Loss to Fund ETH Long
data.description:
Machi Big Brother, identified as @machibigbrother, was liquidated again, according to Lookonchain monitoring. According to Odaily, he sold Bored Ape 6801 two hours earlier for 8.61 ETH to raise more funds for his ETH long position.

The NFT was originally bought three years ago for 23.5 ETH. The sale resulted in a loss of 14.89 ETH, or about $28,000.

data.title: BAYC #6801 Sells for 8.61 ETH, Marking a 14.89 ETH Loss
data.description: Lookonchain monitored a sale of BAYC #6801 by Machi Big Brother two hours ago for 8.61 ETH. According to Foresight News, the NFT was bought three years ago for 23.5 ETH, resulting in a loss of 14.89 ETH.

data.title: Machi Huang Sells Bored Ape NFT at a Loss After Another Liquidation
data.description:
Machi Huang’s address was liquidated again on July 24, prompting him to sell a Bored Ape NFT at a loss to raise funds and maintain his ETH long position. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, Lookonchain said Machi sold Bored Ape #6801 for 8.61 ETH about two hours earlier.

The NFT was originally bought three years ago for 23.5 ETH. The sale resulted in a loss of 14.89 ETH, or about $28,000.

data.title: BTC and ETH Options Expire on July 24 as BTC Put Call Ratio Falls to 0.89
data.description:
Greeks.live macro researcher Adam said on X that 190,000 BTC options expired on July 24, with a put-call ratio of 0.89, a maximum pain level of $64,500, and a notional value of $1.2 billion. According to Odaily, 125,000 ETH options expired with a put-call ratio of 1.25, a maximum pain level of $1,875, and a notional value of $230 million.

Adam said Bitcoin briefly rose above $66,000 this week, but the move was difficult. He said the $80,000 to $65,000 range was a high-volume trading area during the early-year rally, and that it remains important to watch when funds flow into crypto.

He said U.S. stocks tied to SpaceX continued to fall sharply, while the storage sector saw large swings. He added that 4% of options expire this week, with expiration indicators little changed from last week, and that market volatility has remained low with fewer trading opportunities. Implied volatility fell to around 35%.

Adam said BTC gamma exposure is concentrated at $65,000 and $72,000, while ETH gamma exposure is concentrated between $1,900 and $2,200. He said the ETH put-call ratio fell to 1.29 this week, but put options have stayed above 1 for six straight weeks, the longest stretch on record. He also said this shows strong demand for put options and participation from traders buying puts to dip.

He said crypto has been in a bear market for eight months, with limited trading opportunities during that period, and that some rebound may come in the second half of the year.

data.title: DraftKings Co-Founder Says Kalshi CFO Saurabh Tejwani Has Left the Company
data.description: Foresight News reported that DraftKings co-founder Matt Kalish said on X that Kalshi Chief Financial Officer Saurabh Tejwani has quietly departed from the prediction market platform. According to Foresight News, Kalshi has not publicly responded to the report.
